prompt: How many course sections are offered in each semester and academic year?

inputData.question: How many course sections are offered in each semester and academic year?

  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM course_sections cs

visualization.title: Course Sections Offered by Semester and Academic Year

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM course_sections cs
GROUP BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type
ORDER BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type

visualization.title: Course Sections Offered by Semester and Academic Year

result.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  cs.semester_type,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM course_sections cs
GROUP BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type
ORDER BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type
